stimulus: In the early 1970s, inspired in part by traditional Mexican papel picado, Chicana visual artist Carmen Lomas Garza began her celebrated paper-cut series. She ______blank intricate designs into colored tissue paper and mounted them onto gallery walls, where the layered cutouts created shifting patterns of light and shadow.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The past tense “cut” matches the past tense “mounted” in the same coordinate verb phrase with the same subject (“she”): “she cut…and [she] mounted.”

Choice A (perfect infinitive), Choice C (present participle), and Choice D (to-infinitive) are all nonfinite forms that cannot serve as the coordinate finite verb required here.
